description: End-to-end Neuropixels pipeline: load (SpikeGLX/OpenEphys auto-detect) -> preprocess (highpass + bad-channel removal + phase-shift + CMR) -> drift check -> motion correction (auto, if drift > 20 um) -> spike sorting -> postprocess (SortingAnalyzer + quality metrics) -> threshold curation -> export (Phy + report + quality_metrics.csv + unit_labels.json + summary.json), all under record_store.
rules: load -> preprocess -> drift -> motion -> sort -> postprocess -> curate -> export is ONE governed sequence
SORTER is one of kilosort4 | kilosort3 | spykingcircus2 | mountainsort5; CURATION is allen | ibl | strict
all artifacts (preprocessed/, sorting_*, analyzer/, phy_export/, report/, summary.json) land under record_store
captures the run log to record_store/pipeline_report.txt
degrades gracefully (still writes the report, exit 0) when spikeinterface / the sorter is absent
usage: Set DATA_PATH (raw SpikeGLX/OpenEphys recording dir); optional SORTER (default kilosort4), STREAM_NAME (default imec0.ap), CURATION (default allen). Output: pipeline_report.txt + summary.json + the artifact tree.
limitation: Requires spikeinterface and the chosen sorter; kilosort4 needs a CUDA GPU. Heavy/long-running. Writes only to record_store.
